testcase.name: WASM renderer initializes successfully
testcase.system-out: WASM renderer fell back (expected in CI)

testcase.name: WASM renderer loads single shader without errors
WASM renderer loads multiple shaders (multi-slot stack)
WASM renderer handles shader loading with minimal console errors
WASM renderer collects performance metrics
testcase.system-out: === WASM Renderer Metrics === FPS: undefined Init Time: undefined Has Module: undefined ============================== WASM renderer fell back (expected in CI)
